scenarioName: Allow fast development mode without weakening truth

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Allow fast development mode without weakening truth
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The fast report truth command should skip long-running receipt artifact publication but still fail on specific truth guardrail violations such as contaminated verdict, stale report provenance, summary-to-row mismatch, silent local methods, anonymous executable methods, and unsupported clean or sterile claims.
steps.observedResult: No observation could be made regarding the skipping of receipt artifact publication or the failure conditions due to missing evidence.
